description_long: This is a small, military-style airplane with a distinctive delta wing configuration and camouflage paint scheme, featuring green and brown patches with roundel insignias on the wings and tail. The aircraft has a single propeller mounted at the nose and a cockpit situated centrally at the front of the fuselage, which appears to be enclosed. The tail section is compact, with a single vertical stabilizer and rounded horizontal stabilizers, each bearing insignia. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The wings are straight with a slight dihedral angle and lack winglets, giving the airplane a unique, almost flying-wing appearance. The overall design suggests a lightweight, maneuverable craft, likely constructed from metal and composite materials.
description: A small, camouflaged military-style airplane with a delta wing, nose-mounted propeller, and fixed landing gear. It features roundel insignias and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the single vertical stabilizer, rounded tail, and camouflage pattern on the wings and tail.
description_view_1: Direct rear view highlighting the wide delta wing span, twin main landing gear, and compact tail section.
description_view_2: Opposite rear three-quarter view, emphasizing the propeller, cockpit placement, and wing insignia.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose-mounted propeller, forward cockpit, and the full span of the delta wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing delta configuration with straight leading edges, slight dihedral angle, and no winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and rounded horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
